summary: Comprehensive testing of HyperEats food delivery platform completed successfully. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate), frontend UI flows functional across all user roles, authentication system robust, and role-based dashboards operating correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: ElementHandle.click: Element is not attached to the DOM error when clicking kitchen cards after search

passed_tests: Backend API authentication (admin, kitchen provider, delivery agent, customer)
Backend kitchen endpoints (list, get, menu, my kitchen, toggle)
Backend admin analytics and user management
Frontend landing page with hero section and features
Frontend user registration and login flows
Frontend admin dashboard with analytics and user management
Frontend kitchen provider dashboard with orders and menu management
Frontend delivery agent dashboard with delivery management
Frontend customer browse page with 3 seeded kitchens
Frontend cart functionality with quantity controls
Frontend responsive design and UI components
